buildCommand: echo '>>> CWD:'; pwd; echo '>>> NITRO_PRESET:'$NITRO_PRESET; echo '>>> agent-native bin:'; ls -la node_modules/.bin/agent-native* 2>&1 | head -3; echo '>>> Running agent-native build...'; ./node_modules/.bin/agent-native build; echo '>>> build exit:'$?; echo '>>> .vercel/output structure:'; find .vercel/output -maxdepth 3 2>&1 | head -50
